title: Urban Transportation Simulator
short: Simulation model for optimizing urban mobility.
description: Designed and developed a simulation model to analyze urban mobility patterns, optimizing traffic flow and public transportation efficiency. Integrated real-world constraints, tested scenarios, and improved system performance through iterative modeling.

title: Galápagos Recommendations Web App
description: Built a modular front-end architecture using JavaScript ES modules. Developed a review system with rating visualization, comment storage, and automatic ordering by date.
